deviations.what: The Slider liveChange recomputes the host Panel.width (bound) as value + '%' server-side; the original set byId('panelForGridList').setWidth imperatively. Slider.value carries a binding to carry the value back.

GridList with a grid:GridBoxLayout (boxMinWidth 17rem) and a GridListItem template (VBox + FlexItemData, Title, Label). The 27 items are inlined from model/items.json; the template binds {TITLE}/{SUBTITLE} 1:1.
